hero.title: Build Your Professional Resume
hero.subtitle: in Minutes
hero.description: Create stunning, ATS-friendly resumes with our easy-to-use builder. Choose from 25 professionally designed templates and export to PDF, DOCX, and more. No sign-up required.

features.title: Everything You Need to Land Your Dream Job
features.subtitle: Powerful Features

templates.title: 25 Templates
templates.description: Modern, classic, creative, and industry-specific designs for every career path.

ats.title: ATS-Friendly
ats.description: All templates are optimized for Applicant Tracking Systems used by top employers.

export.title: Multi-Format Export
export.description: Export to PDF, DOCX, HTML, JSON, and plain text with one click.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your data stays in your browser. No accounts, no tracking, no servers.

customization.title: Full Customization
customization.description: Edit every section, reorder content, and personalize your resume exactly how you want.

pwa.title: Works Offline
pwa.description: Install as an app and build resumes anywhere, even without internet.

privacy.title: Your Data, Your Resume
privacy.subtitle: Privacy First
privacy.description: Everything you create stays on your device. We never see, store, or process your data. No accounts, no servers, no tracking — just you and your resume.
privacy.verified: Verified: No data leaves your device. No exceptions.
privacy.dataLocalDesc: All resume data is processed and stored entirely in your browser using localStorage.
privacy.noTrackingDesc: We don't use analytics, cookies, or any tracking scripts. Your privacy is absolute.
privacy.noServersDesc: There's no backend database. Your personal information never leaves your device.
privacy.youControlDesc: Your resumes are yours. Delete them anytime — they exist only on your device.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Resume?
cta.description: Join thousands of professionals who've created their perfect resume with Resume Craft. Free, fast, and no sign-up required.
